case_title: JOHN CHARLES VS. ARNOLD DE LA CRUZ ET. AL.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-25-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT JOUSE LURANTE WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ARNOLD DE LA CRUZ WAIVES SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO JOUSE LURANTE BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF APR-25-2014 AT 1:30 PM.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY CHARLES, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ, ARNOLD ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-14-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF JOHN CHARLES RE: AMENDEDING CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARLES, JOHN
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - AMENDED SC -100 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARLES, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ, ARNOLD
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARLES, JOHN
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHARLES, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT LURANTE, JOUSE

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHARLES, JOHN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ, ARNOLD PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST JOUSE LURANTI IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE--NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
RETURN MAIL - NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT - SENT TO JOUSE LURANTE
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY CHARLES, JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ, ARNOLD LURANTE, JOUSE
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHARLES, JOHN
TRIAL RESET TO APR-25-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-14-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-25-2014 - JUDGMENT.
